data.title: Social platform Giggles raises $1.2 million in pre-seed funding.
data.description: Giggles has raised $1.2 million in pre-seed funding from investors including 1kx Capital, Virtuals Protocol, Social Graph Ventures, and angel investors with backgrounds in OpenAI and Bain Capital. Positioned as a social application similar to TikTok, Giggles allows users to "trade" content, combining information dissemination with market mechanisms. The project launched its beta version in August 2025 and has already attracted approximately 150,000 users to participate in content trading, covering about 10,000 videos. Currently, there are 400,000 people on the waiting list, and the official launch in the US is planned for soon.

data.title: Bitcoin Leads Social Dominance, Ethereum Tops AI Search Volume
data.description: Bitcoin has emerged as the leader in social dominance with a share of 34.35%, followed by Ethereum at 11.65%. According to NS3.AI, Ethereum also leads the AI search volume list with an 11% share, while the Solana Foundation ranks second at 10%.

data.title: AI Platform Surf Introduces Tool for Cryptocurrency Data Analysis
data.description:
On April 9, Surf, a specialized AI platform for the cryptocurrency sector, announced the launch of its Surf Skill CLI tool. According to BlockBeats, this tool enables AI agents like Claude Code to directly access cryptocurrency data, potentially replacing over 60 independent APIs.

Once users install the tool, AI agents can provide real-time market analysis, on-chain DeFi TVL, and social trend insights, offering structured insights into the crypto market.

Additionally, SurfAI, as a crypto-native AI research platform, has made available a $200,000 API credit limit for free. This initiative is compatible with various agent environments, aiming to streamline the workflow between developers and AI in the cryptocurrency domain.

data.title: Trump Denounces Reports on Iran Negotiation Plan as False
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has criticized reports from The New York Times and CNN regarding a ten-point plan on Iran negotiations. According to Odaily, Trump labeled these reports as entirely fabricated and aimed at discrediting those involved in the peace process. He dismissed the points as fraudulent schemes and called the media outlets 'evil losers.' Trump concluded his statement with a call to 'Make America Great Again.'

data.title: VANA Token Unlock Scheduled for April 16
data.description: VANA is set to unlock approximately 2.57 million tokens on April 16 at 19:00 UTC+8. According to ChainCatcher, this token release is valued at around $3.36 million, based on data from the Web3 asset data platform RootData.

data.title: An address attempting to manipulate FARTCOIN by going long was liquidated, resulting in a loss of $3.02 million, while the short position ADL profited $849,000.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, some addresses attempted to establish long positions in FARTCOIN through multiple wallets, accumulating a total of 145.24 million FARTCOIN tokens, but were ultimately forced to liquidate, resulting in a loss of approximately $3.02 million. Meanwhile, some short positions profited through the Automatic Deleveraging (ADL) mechanism, with addresses 0x06ce and 0x4196 collectively realizing approximately $849,000 in profits.

data.title: Bitcoin Developer Adam Back Addresses Quantum Computing Concerns
data.description:
Bitcoin developer Adam Back has dismissed fears of a quantum computing crisis, asserting that humanity has at least a decade to prepare. According to Bitalk News, Back emphasized that current quantum hardware is still in its infancy, lacking error correction capabilities, and has only achieved basic calculations such as elementary-level factorization. He noted that Google's recent paper merely improved algorithms without any hardware breakthroughs.

Back reassured that Bitcoin has ample time to adapt, with Liquid serving as a Layer 2 testing ground that has historically been adopted by the Bitcoin main chain after new signature formats were introduced. He argued that genuine solutions are already in progress, and that media-driven panic is more about selling headlines than reflecting technical realities.

data.title: Mitsui OSK Lines to Review US-Iran Ceasefire Before Navigating Strait of Hormuz
data.description: Japan’s Mitsui OSK Lines, a leading global shipping company, plans to closely examine the specifics of a ceasefire agreement between the United States and Iran before permitting its vessels to traverse the Strait of Hormuz. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the strategic importance of this waterway, which is a critical passage for global oil shipments. The company aims to ensure the safety and security of its operations in the region, given the historical tensions and potential risks associated with navigating this vital maritime route. Mitsui OSK Lines' decision underscores the cautious approach taken by major shipping firms in response to geopolitical developments that could impact international trade and shipping lanes.

data.title: Trump: The New York Times and CNN's 10-point plan on Iran negotiations is fake news.
data.description: On April 9th, US President Trump stated: "The failed New York Times and CNN, which publish fake news, both reported a completely false ten-point plan regarding the Iran negotiations, designed to smear those involved in the peace process. All ten points are fabricated hoaxes—evil losers!!! Make America Great Again!" (Jin Shi)

data.title: Japan's Finance Minister: Middle East Conflict Impacts Japanese Bond Yields More Than Expected
data.description: Japan's Finance Minister Satuki Katayama has highlighted the significant impact of the ongoing Middle East conflict on Japanese government bond yields. According to Jin10, Katayama noted that the influence of overseas markets on Japan's bond yields has been greater than initially anticipated. This observation underscores the interconnectedness of global financial markets and the potential for geopolitical events to affect economic indicators in countries far removed from the conflict's epicenter. The situation calls for careful monitoring and strategic planning to mitigate any adverse effects on Japan's financial stability.

data.title: Jupiter has opened applications for its Q1 2026 ASR rewards, with a total prize pool of 50 million JUP.
data.description: Jupiter officially announced on X that the ASR rewards for the first quarter of 2026 are now open for claiming, with a total prize pool of 50 million JUP.

data.title: Goldman Sachs Revises Oil Price Forecasts for Second Quarter
data.description: Goldman Sachs has adjusted its oil price forecasts for the second quarter, citing changes in risk premiums and increased crude flow through the Suez Canal. According to BlockBeats, the financial institution has lowered its Brent crude price prediction to $90 per barrel and its West Texas Intermediate (WTI) crude forecast to $87 per barrel as of April 9.

data.title: Crypto Industry Faces Severe Challenges Similar to 2019
data.description: The cryptocurrency sector is experiencing significant difficulties reminiscent of the extreme downturn in 2019. According to PANews, the industry is grappling with a severe lack of secondary market liquidity, a freeze in primary investment and financing activities, and a notable loss of talent. These challenges are contributing to a harsh environment for businesses and individuals involved in the crypto space.

data.title: Applied Compute Secures $80 Million Funding, Valued at $1.3 Billion
data.description:
Applied Compute has successfully raised $80 million in funding, bringing its post-investment valuation to $1.3 billion. According to ChainCatcher, the funding round was led by Kleiner Perkins, with participation from Elad Gil, Lux Capital, Greenoaks, NEO, and Hana Bicapital. The total funding raised by the company now stands at $160 million.

The mission of Applied Compute is to bridge the gap between 'smart' and 'useful' through 'Specific Intelligence.' These proprietary intelligent agents are trained based on the real-world operations of companies and are designed to continuously evolve. The company aims to assist businesses in unlocking their institutional context by training intelligent agents for specific workflows and performance standards, and deploying them to the production frontlines.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation Sells Significant Portion of Planned ETH Sale
data.description: The Ethereum Foundation has reportedly sold a substantial portion of its planned Ethereum (ETH) sale. According to BlockBeats, on-chain analyst Yu Jin observed that the foundation intended to sell 5,000 ETH. As of now, 3,750 ETH, valued at approximately $8.3 million, have already been sold at an average price of $2,214 per ETH.

data.title: Market Shows Signs of Bottoming, Says Fundstrat Co-Founder
data.description: Fundstrat co-founder and BitMine chairman Tom Lee expressed optimism about the market's future in a recent interview with CNBC. According to PANews, Lee highlighted clear signals indicating that the market has reached a bottom. He remains positive about the energy sector, the seven major U.S. stocks, the software industry, and cryptocurrencies such as Ethereum and Bitcoin.

data.title: South Korea Proposes Stablecoin Classification as Foreign Exchange Instruments
data.description: South Korea is considering a proposal to classify stablecoins as foreign exchange instruments. According to NS3.AI, this move would bring stablecoin companies engaged in cross-border transactions under the oversight of domestic foreign exchange authorities. The proposal aims to enhance regulatory control over the use of stablecoins in international financial activities.

data.title: Significant Bet Placed on Thunder in NBA Regular Season Matchup Against Clippers
data.description:
A notable prediction event on Polymarket involves a user with a win rate exceeding 58% who has invested $270,000 on the Oklahoma City Thunder defeating the Los Angeles Clippers. According to Odaily, the average opening price for this bet was 76.2¢.

The NBA regular season game between the Thunder and the Clippers commenced today at 10 a.m. UTC+8. As the game progresses into the first quarter, the Thunder hold a record of 63 wins and 16 losses, placing them first in the Western Conference. Meanwhile, the Clippers are ranked eighth with a record of 41 wins and 38 losses.

data.title: Hong Kong Optical Communication Stocks Surge as Market Strengthens
data.description: Hong Kong's optical communication sector continues to show strong performance, with several key stocks experiencing significant gains. According to Jin10, Huiju Technology (01729.HK) saw an increase of over 8%, while Yangtze Optical Fibre and Cable (06869.HK) rose by more than 5%. Other companies such as Cambridge Technology (06166.HK) and Hua Hong Semiconductor (01347.HK) also followed the upward trend, contributing to the sector's overall growth.

data.title: The US SOL spot ETF saw a total net outflow of $1.9208 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (April 8th, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of SOL spot ETFs was $1.9208 million. The SOL spot ETF with the largest net outflow yesterday was the Grayscale Solana Trust (GSOL), with a net outflow of $867,100, bringing its historical total net inflow to $103 million. The second largest was the Bitwise Solana Staking ETF (BSOL), with a net outflow of $779,600, bringing its historical total net inflow to $778 million. As of press time, the total net asset value of SOL spot ETFs was $794 million, with an SOL net asset ratio of 1.66%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $963 million.
